scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:a11y
scripts.test:a11y: npm run build && npm run a11y:install && start-server-and-test "next start -p 3001" http://127.0.0.1:3001 "pa11y-ci --config .pa11yci.json"
scripts.setup: patch-package && mkdir -p public/fonts && cp node_modules/@fremtind/jokul/src/fonts/FremtindGrotesk-*.woff* public/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fremtind/jokul/src/fonts/Fremtind-Material-Symbols.woff2 public/fonts/
scripts.pages:dev: npm run setup && npx @cloudflare/next-on-pages@1 && wrangler pages dev
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages deploy .vercel/output/static --project-name=lmfaole
